prompts.name: Slim Build
prompts.text: Give the subject a slim build with graceful proportions, natural posture, and balanced anatomy.

prompts.name: Athletic Build
prompts.text: Give the subject an athletic build with toned structure, confident posture, and believable body strength.

prompts.name: Curvy Build
prompts.text: Give the subject a curvy build with balanced proportions, natural silhouette, and tasteful presentation.

prompts.name: Petite Build
prompts.text: Give the subject a petite build with smaller frame, balanced proportions, and clear character readability.

prompts.name: Tall Build
prompts.text: Give the subject a tall build with elongated proportions, elegant posture, and strong silhouette.

prompts.name: Soft Build
prompts.text: Give the subject a softer build with gentle body contours, relaxed posture, and natural anatomy.

prompts.name: Muscular Build
prompts.text: Give the subject a muscular build with defined structure, realistic strength, and balanced proportions.

prompts.name: Dancer Build
prompts.text: Give the subject a dancer-like build with graceful posture, flexible body lines, and elegant movement.

prompts.name: Broad Shoulders
prompts.text: Give the subject broader shoulders with strong silhouette and balanced upper-body structure.

prompts.name: Narrow Shoulders
prompts.text: Give the subject narrower shoulders for a delicate silhouette and softer overall frame.

prompts.name: Long Legs
prompts.text: Give the subject long legs with elegant proportions, natural stance, and balanced anatomy.

prompts.name: Natural Proportions
prompts.text: Use natural body proportions with believable anatomy, grounded posture, and coherent silhouette.

prompts.name: Graceful Posture
prompts.text: Emphasize graceful posture with relaxed shoulders, balanced spine, and elegant body alignment.

prompts.name: Confident Posture
prompts.text: Emphasize confident posture with stable stance, lifted head, and strong body language.

prompts.name: Relaxed Posture
prompts.text: Emphasize relaxed posture with natural weight distribution, soft shoulders, and comfortable body language.
